title: USS Coronado
summary:
USS Coronado may refer to:

USS Coronado (PF-38), a patrol frigate, served in World War II as a convoy escort.
USS Coronado (AGF-11), an auxiliary command ship, hosted the Navy's Sea Based Battle Lab (SBB).
USS Coronado (LCS-4), the fourth littoral combat ship commissioned on 5 April 2014.
